subcodes.first_line: In this day the essence of praise proclaimeth that there is none other God but He, and the reality of thanksgiving declareth that He is the First and the Last [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز کینونت حمد بانه لا اله الا هو ناطق و حقیقه شکر بانه هو الاول و الاخر و
subcodes.subjects: @justice and wrath of God, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for governments and rulers, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @alcohol and drugs; tobacco; opium
